label: critical-l
headline_statement: Confirmed critical-L result. Under Assumptions~\ref{ass:grid-bounds}--\ref{ass:regularity}, define \(\mathcal F_0(P)=\{(\alpha,L):A_{\mathrm{CGS}}\alpha=b_{\mathrm{CGS}}(P),\ \theta_h(\alpha)=0,\ \underline y\le\alpha_{jh}\le\overline y,\ |\alpha_{j h}-\alpha_{j h'}|\le L|d_h-d_{h'}|\ \forall j,h,h',\ 0\le L\le\bar L\}\). The endpoint maps \(L\mapsto L_h(L;P)\) and \(L\mapsto U_h(L;P)\) are respectively nonincreasing and nondecreasing finite piecewise-linear functions on \([0,\bar L]\). The critical constant \(L_h^\star(P)=\inf\{L\in[0,\bar L]:L_h(L;P)\le0\le U_h(L;P)\}\), with value \(+\infty\) if the zero-contact set is empty, is exactly \(\min\{L:(\alpha,L)\in\mathcal F_0(P)\}\), with the same \(+\infty\) convention for LP infeasibility. If \(B\) ranges over the finite nonsingular active bases of this LP, each basis has an affine candidate value \(L_B^\star(P)=a_B^\transpose b_{\mathrm{CGS}}(P)+c_B\) on the polyhedral region where that basis is feasible and optimal, and globally \(L_h^\star(P)=\min_B L_B^\star(P)\) over feasible optimal basis pieces, i.e. the lower envelope of the basis-specific affine pieces.
